mapper.update: delete from base_user_staff_map; INSERT INTO `base_user_staff_map` ( user_id, staff_id, create_user, created_date ) SELECT bud.id, bud.`archives_id`, #{dateNumber}, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW()) FROM base_user_detail bud, base_department_staff bds WHERE bud.`archives_id` = bds.`id` AND bud.`deleted` = 0 AND bds.`status` <> 4;
